creator: deischen@FreeBSD.org
text:
misc/kdeedu3 is broken on -current.  This is needed for kde3 to build.

/bin/sh /usr/local/bin/libtool --silent --tag=CC   --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../../../.. -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include  -D_THREAD_SAFE -pthread -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT   -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H -D_THREAD_SAFE  -I/usr/local/include  -DNDEBUG -O2  -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -MT libfli-usb-sys-bsd.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/libfli-usb-sys-bsd.Tpo -c -o libfli-usb-sys-bsd.lo libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:47:32: error: legacy/dev/usb/usb.h: No such file or directory
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c: In function 'unix_usbverifydescriptor':
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:62: error: 'usb_device_descriptor_t' undeclared (first use in this function)
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:62: error: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:62: error: for each function it appears in.)
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:62: error: expected ';' before 'usb_desc'
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:65: error: 'usb_desc' undeclared (first use in this function)
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c: In function 'bsd_bulkwrite':
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:109: error: 'USB_SET_TIMEOUT' undeclared (first use in this function)
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c: In function 'bsd_bulkread':
libfli-usb-sys-bsd.c:129: error: 'USB_SET_TIMEOUT' undeclared (first use in this function)
gmake[5]: *** [libfli-usb-sys-bsd.lo] Error 1
gmake[5]: Leaving directory `/opt/FreeBSD/ports/misc/kdeedu3/work/kdeedu-3.5.10/kstars/kstars/indi/fli'
gmake[4]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/opt/FreeBSD/ports/misc/kdeedu3/work/kdeedu-3.5.10/kstars/kstars/indi'
gmake[3]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/opt/FreeBSD/ports/misc/kdeedu3/work/kdeedu-3.5.10/kstars/kstars'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/opt/FreeBSD/ports/misc/kdeedu3/work/kdeedu-3.5.10/kstars'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/opt/FreeBSD/ports/misc/kdeedu3/work/kdeedu-3.5.10'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /opt/FreeBSD/ports/misc/kdeedu3.
